title: Skye 的 iPhone 人工智能主屏应用程序在推出前获得投资者支持
content: Skye 的新人工智能应用程序在推出之前就吸引了投资者——这表明人们对更具人工智能意识的 iPhone 感兴趣。
original_title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
original_content: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

title: DeepSeek 新模型重要的三个原因
content: 4月24日，中国人工智能公司DeepSeek发布了其期待已久的新旗舰机型V4的预览。该模型可以处理比上一代更长的提示，这要归功于新的设计，有助于它更有效地处理大量文本。与 DeepSeek 之前的型号一样，V4 是开放式的
original_title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
original_content: On April 24, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. The model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. title: 幂律的力量：不对称性促进组合推理
content:

title: 苹果下一任首席执行官需要推出杀手级人工智能产品
content: 蒂姆·库克是一位伟大的首席执行官，但他并没有破解人工智能。  这是约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 的首要工作。
original_title: Apple's Next CEO Needs to Launch a Killer AI Product
original_content: Tim Cook was a great CEO, but he didn’t crack AI.  It’s job number 1 for John Ternus.
